title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Pandey sets out to locate and apprehend Popatlal and decides to search for him in every place he could have visited.

subTitle: While inspector Pandey continues his search for Popatlal in the colony, Popatlal hides inside Bhide's house, causing problems for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After a long search, Popatlal is found hiding in his closet. When questioned about his disappearance, he opens up about how overwhelmingly stressed and anxious he was feeling.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone feels pleased to see Popatlal's relaxed demeanour. A promising marriage prospect emerges for Popatlal.

subTitle: Popatlal becomes more impatient as he waits for Inspector Pandey to call and confirm whether his and the girl's horoscope matches.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal decides to finally come clean with his potential bride and tell her everything honestly without knowing how she would react.

subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried about Popatlal when Madhubala makes a decision about marrying him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal and his friends meet up with Madhubala's family to hear Madhubala's decision about her marriage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham is bursting with happiness and excitement. They make preparations for Popatlal's engagement.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Jethalal realises that business is rather slow, he immediately asks his staff to cut down on expenses.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal endures a rather depressing day in terms of business and is convinced that he needs good luck and positivity. He shares his ordeal with his friends in the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal wakes up with the stern resolution to stay positive to attract good luck. So, he avoids getting angry at Bhide, Daya, Iyer, Bagha and many others.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally loses his temper when Bagha asks for leave. His anger grows when Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is pleased that Bawri has agreed to visit his shop daily. Champaklal does not comply with Jethalal's thinking.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A business association receives a complaint against Jethalal, following which they summon him. Jethalal wonders about the reason for his summon.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal is impressed with Daya's diligence in managing household expenses. Madhavi convinces Bhide to let her go shopping for saris.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya tries to talk Jethalal into going to Goa for a family trip, with one of her friends tagging along.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Bhide feels angry on seeing Tapu Sena playing Holi and causing trouble, he yells at them to go home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer secretly makes a plan to take Babita to Mahabaleshwar on Holi. He confides in Daya and tells her his idea.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal also plans a trip to Mahabaleshwar on Holi after hearing about Iyer's idea to take Babita there.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya learns about the trip to Mahabaleshwar but finds it increasingly difficult to keep the news to herself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is surprised to discover that Babita is no longer going to Mahabaleshwar as they had planned.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gokuldham residents are enjoying the Holi celebration. However, Jethalal is stuck in his flat and decides to escape through the balcony.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gada family learn about a robbery in their area and prepare to keep their valuables safe. Jethalal receives a large cash payment from a man dressed in shabby clothes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A gang of chain snatchers rob Anjali's gold necklace, frightening the members of Gokuldham Society. Jethalal finds an innovative way to carry a large sum of cash home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The gang of robbers choose Mohanlal as their next victim and fire their guns in the society when they get caught. When Jethalal learns about the incident, he rushes back home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal worries about the large amount of cash in his house. Tapu and his friends prepare to protect Gokuldham from the robbers.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak and Jethalal try to convince everyone to hire a security guard after several robberies, but they reject the idea.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally decides to hire a security guard for everyone's safety. Bhide eventually fires the guard, making Jethalal worried.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham experiences a frightening night when thieves rob Jethalal at gunpoint. The following day, Taarak introduces a new security guard to protect the community.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The new security guard proves his worth when another robber strikes Gokuldham. The women take action to enhance community safety.

subTitle: Tapu's friends and Gokuldham's women join forces to protect their community from criminals. The robbers find a chance to rob Jethalal.

subTitle: Disguised as repairmen, the thieves enter Jethalal's home. Their plan backfires when they learn that the real repairmen are already in the house.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The robbers threaten Daya, forcing Jethalal to surrender. As they flee, Tapu and his friends block their escape route.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu and his friends gets honoured and felicitated for their bravery. Everyone get invited to participate in an anti-tobacco campaign.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer jokingly tells Jethalal to move out of Gokuldham and go back to his hometown. Upon hearing, Jethalal feels perplexed by his friends words.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Being troubled by the current issues at work, Bagha decides to call Nattu Kaka to discuss their concerns.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal believes that he should confront Bagha and Nattu Kaka to settle their agreement once and for all, but he eventually runs into Babita and Iyer.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer jokingly teases Jethalal by telling everyone to punish him for being late. Jethalal comes up with a revenge plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham society agrees to host Holi with safety precautions. Tapu comes up with a plan to surprise his friends during the festival.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Gokuldam society prepares for Holi celebrations, Tapu and his friends introduce an exciting new game.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: During the Holi game, Tapu and his friends play a prank on the others. Madhavi becomes an unsuspecting victim of one of their tricks.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal and his friends participate in a race to test their fitness. He wins the race and Jethalal feels happy. Later, Champaklal encounters a spoilt brat and decides to teach him a lesson.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Vicky, a spoilt brat, seeks revenge on Champaklal and comes up with an evil idea. He prints poster of Champaklal and states that they are suffering from mental illness.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Champaklal reprimands him for spitting on the road, Vicky takes revenge by putting up posters of Champaklal all over the town.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Seeing the posters, two men bring Champaklal to Jethalal's house and demand reward money from him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal explains the root cause of his problems to Tapu and his friends. They resolve to help him come up with a working solution.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to stop Tapu Sena as they chase the culprit with bicycles.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Nattu Kaka and Bagha propose a plan to draw customers to Jethalal, but the plan backfires when customers swarm the store trying to claim the prize.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi and Popatlal are looking for Vicky, but he has come up with another plan to terrorise Champaklal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal escapes and becomes stuck in the boot of a car. Meanwhile, Jethalal learns that Champaklal is gone and Sodhi, Bhide, and other residents set off to search for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While hanging out with his friends, Vicky feels remorse for what he has done to Champaklal and wants to help him out. Meanwhile, Champaklal gets out of the boot and the others continue their search for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal's identity is mistaken, and he is sent to a mental asylum. Meanwhile, Jethalal files a missing person report at the police station.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal does not hit Vicky, much to everyone's surprise. Soon, he offers an apology and a few words of wisdom instead.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gada family is happy as Champaklal has returned home safely. Later, Jethalal decides to throw a party despite the other residents' reluctance over the matter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal decides to take everybody for a picnic and secretly delivers them free coupons to a theme park. Soon, the families find the coupons and are excited to go for the picnic.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds out Babita is going to Pune to play Holi and promises Babita he will arrange the celebration in Gokuldham. Taarak makes fun of Anjali while she works.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Two thieves ask Bagha to help them hide. An inspector stakes out Jethalal's store to look for the thieves.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Bagha successfully hides two thieves from the police, they eventually ask to stay in the godown for the night.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bagha does not know what to do about his friends in the warehouse and decides to tell Jethalal about them. However, he later sneaks inside to help them escape.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the Gokuldham residents celebrate Holi inside a farmhouse. However, after learning about the incident at the warehouse, Nattu Kaka, Bagha, and Jethalal hurry there.

subTitle: Jethalal, Bagha, and Nattu Kaka are interrogated after the police find the two criminals hiding inside Jethalal's store.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After getting released by the police, Nattu Kaka and Bagha try to make up with Jethalal by writing him a heartfelt apology letter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak gets a phone call from Popatlal who is ready to return to the society. Meanwhile, the residents of Gokuldham prepare to welcome him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal makes his presence known in Gokuldham Society when he creates a ruckus about his conveyance with a truck driver. But when the residents arrive, the matter gets worse.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The truck driver relays his horrid experience of travelling with Popatlal. But he soon gets into a brawl with the journalist when Popatlal refuses to pay his conveyance fare.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal entails a risky stunt to enter his house when he is unable to find his keys. But he causes a new inconvenience for the men of Gokuldham when he commands them to guard his valuables.

subTitle: Tapu comes up with a plan to prank Bhide with a fake lizard.

subTitle: Tapu's family is happy to see him focusing on his studies, but Bhide soon catches him reading comic books.

subTitle: Baapu Ji gets angry thinking about how teachers overwork their students.

subTitle: The parents visit the school to attend a meeting with the teachers. Soon, the teachers start handing out reports of their kids' performance progress.

subTitle: The reports surprise everyone greatly. Meanwhile, Bhide scolds Sonu for his bad performance.

subTitle: Jethalal joins Babita and Roshan in a game of badminton. However, Iyer gets jealous seeing Jethalal and Babita together.

subTitle: Sodhi protests the cutting of trees as everyone is preparing to celebrate Holi. The residents come together to calm him down.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham Society eagerly await Shahrukh Khan and Sachin Tendulkar's arrival. When the two guests arrive, the residents begin doubting their authenticity.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

subTitle: Baldev is furious over Bulbul's marriage and tries to shoot Popatlal when they meet. The members try to convince Baldev to accept Bulbul and Popatlal's marriage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide gets very upset when Tapu and friends break the rear-view mirror of his scooter. He angrily approaches Jethalal's house and demands that he fix the mirror.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: On the first day of the year, Tapu organises a cleanliness drive in Gokuldham; A mysterious car splashes mud on Champaklal's clothes, angering him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu and his friends accidentally break the rear-view mirror of Bhide's scooter. Later, Bhide comes to Jethalal's house to demand he fixes the mirror.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babita tries to stop the fight between Jethalal and Bhide. Later, Tapu Sena confess to Jethalal that they have broken the rear-view mirror of Bhide's scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A boy suddenly appears in front of Bhide as he rides his scooter, making Bhide swerve off the road and injure himself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide witnesses two thieves stealing his scooter and records them on a video. Later, he finds his scooter tied to a crane.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide asks Don Baadal to return his scooter and Don Baadal asks for money in exchange. However, the number shocks Bhide.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Don Baadal gives Bhide two days to collect one crore rupees he requests in exchange for the scooter. Soon, Bhide and his family come together to find the money.

subTitle: Daya informs Jethalal about the incident with Bhide's scooter and Don Baadal. However, Bhide mistakenly assumes that Jethalal is helping him with the money.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide's neighbours brainstorm about a plan to get his scooter back from Don Baadal. Later, Popatlal informs Toofan about the incident.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Toofan arrives at Gokuldham and Bhide asks him to help retreive his scooter from Don Baadal. Soon, Toofan has a talk with Don Baadal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide is shocked seeing Toofan bow in front of Don Baadal as it is revealed that Don Baadal is his mentor. Later, Sodhi promises he will get Bhide's scooter back in twelve hours.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal suggests they try to drug Don Baadal by giving him a kulfi. Soon, Bhide's neighbours get on with the plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya and the neighbours prepare the kulfi for Don Baadal. Later, Jethalal and his friends disguise themselves as kulfi sellers and visit Don Baadal's bungalow.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: At Don Baadal's house, Jethalal urges Iyer to try the kulfi before offering it to Don Baadal.

subTitle: Jethalal decides to come home early to surprise Daya. However, he has to cross many hurdles on his way back home.

subTitle: Gogi's results are out, and he is happy that he has passed. However, Sonu, Tapu and Goli are tense as they do not yet know their results.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena and their parents eagerly wait for the final exam results. Gogi becomes worried about being left alone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal chides Bhide for not informing him about the date of the exam results. He also warns Bhide that he is responsible for Tapu's grades and that they better be good.

subTitle: As decided by the men, Taarak holds a counselling session for all the SSC students. He asks them about their plans and also offers guidance.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After the counselling session, the kids choose their respective fields. However, they wonder if they can get admission to the same college.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After learning that the exam corrections have been severe, Daya's mother offers a solution. However, the solution causes a problem for Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is waiting excitedly to play Holi with Babita. However, Iyer asks Babita not to play Holi as he needs to take photos of himself for a conference.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to convince Babita to play Holi with him despite Iyer asking her not to. Eventually, Babita agrees and brings Iyer along with her.

subTitle: The Gokuldham residents are enjoying Holi together. However, Jethalal becomes suspicious of Sundar's intention at the celebration.

subTitle: Mistaking Iyer for Sunder, Jethalal puts permanent colour on Iyer's face. Later, Iyer finds out that it cannot be washed away with water.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal calls up Taarak Mehta to help him get a hold of Sunder who does not pick up his phone. Soon, Jethalal learns that the colour may take a month to wash off.

subTitle: After finding out the colour he puts on Iyer's face will not be washed off so easily, Jethalal realises he is in big trouble and has to ask Sunder for help.

subTitle: The Gokuldham residents try out different plans to help Iyer get rid of the paint on his face, but none of them is successful.

subTitle: Iyer tries everything to wash the paint off his face, but he is still unsuccessful. Later, Tappu suggests they digitally correct the colours of his photos instead.

subTitle: Iyer finds out he has to head for the conference in the evening before he can see a skin specialist and get the paint removed from his face.
